headline: This Copper Stock Is Worth Mining. The Metal’s Boom Is On.
summary: Worries about the Iran war have rocked financial markets, raising concerns that higher oil prices will lead to a global economic slowdown.  Copper, one of the more highly cyclical metals, has pulled back as a result—as have shares of  Freeport-McMoRan  the largest copper miner in the U.S.  Freeport is down more than 10% from its 52-week high.

headline: State Power Over Minerals Grows, Raising Risks For Global Supply Chains
